https://youtube.com/live/yFfLDBjJPNA?feature=share - 

I'm doing a stream of today's 2.4 update


1. We'll go over the patch notes together, discuss a little of how it feels and all that, and roll the Gacha with free cores
2. Test out some of the new character changes, probably alva
3. Go over the new dailies and deep dive/Traphase
4. If we have time left we can do the Arc 2, Chapter 2 in prep for Chapter 4 release.

- Stream language is TH/EN
